prompt: This is [Name]. Please reconstruct the attached image as a presentation board for a high-end fragrance brand's perfume bottle created by a professional product designer. Place the bottle design in the center as the main visual, and arrange a fictional brand logo, a Japanese catchphrase, abstract graphics representing the scent concept, and material texture samples in a sophisticated grid-based layout. Design it as a complete magazine spread advertisement that emphasizes the character's essential charm and refined elegance. Do not include any real brand names. Write any descriptions in my native language.
